Hero.text: Silbannacus, the Emperor of the Holy Roman Empire, is known for his boldness in venturing into unknown lands. While on a voyage, his fleet was unfortunately caught by a storm and went missing at sea. After enduring a treacherous storm, the Emperor and his fleet finally arrived at an unexplored land. Inspired by this discovery, Silbannacus resolved to conquer this new land called Calradia.
